description_long: This modern chaise features a spacious L-shaped design with a left-side extended lounge and a right-side two-seat section, both upholstered in a light gray, finely striped fabric. The backrest is straight and uniform in height, supporting a row of seven loose, overstuffed cushions in alternating shades of gray and blue, adding both comfort and visual contrast. The armrests are broad, flat, and rectangular, matching the height of the backrest and providing a clean, boxy silhouette. The base sits on short, blocky black feet that slightly elevate the chaise off the ground, giving it a sturdy and grounded appearance. The upholstery is tightly fitted, with subtle horizontal striping that enhances the contemporary aesthetic. This piece is well-suited for urban outdoor or indoor environments, offering ample seating and lounging space.
description: A contemporary L-shaped chaise with striped gray upholstery, broad armrests, and seven loose cushions in gray and blue tones. The design is boxy, modern, and inviting, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, all seven cushions, and both armrests clearly.
description_view_1: Side view from the right, highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the layered cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight, continuous backrest and the arrangement of cushions from behind.
description_view_3: Side view from the left, emphasizing the extended lounge section and the alignment of the cushions.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, uniform in height, and runs the full length of the seating area, providing a continuous support surface. It is visually softened by a row of loose, overstuffed cushions, with no visible tufting or decorative cutouts.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both the left and right sides, broad and rectangular, matching the height of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, blocky, and black, positioned at the corners and slightly inset, giving the chaise a low, stable profile. They appear to be made of wood or a similar sturdy material with a matte finish.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a subtle, fine horizontal striped pattern in light gray, giving the surface a modern, textured appearance without any tufting or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are seven loose cushions arranged in a single row along the backrest, alternating between light gray and blue. The cushions are large, overstuffed, and evenly spaced, providing both comfort and decorative contrast.
